title: .NET Open Source For SEO
description: Develop a .NET Open Source project that focuses on SEO optimization and best practices. The project is provided full source with all features to help developers build, deploy and enjoy a website with the SEO performance of their .NET applications and React JS.

title: Gold Savings Mobile App
description: Develop a mobile application for managing gold savings. The app allows users to track their gold investments, view market prices, and manage their portfolio efficiently.

title: Small Chatbot Project
description: Develop a small chatbot project that can handle basic customer inquiries and provide automated responses. The project utilizes natural language processing and machine learning techniques to improve its accuracy over time.
